channel.title: MCP Server on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MCP Server on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL MCP Server
item.description:
SQL MCP Server is now generally available. It provides a secure, high-performance way to build agentic solutions with controlled access to production data, and supports SQL with compatibility for PostgreSQL and Azure Cosmos DB.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Secret scanning in AI coding agents via the GitHub MCP Server
item.description:
GitHub MCP Server can now scan code changes for exposed secrets before commit or pull request creation. The feature is intended to catch credential leaks early in AI coding agent workflows.

  • Source: GitHub
